  1. org.springframework.ai.chat.client

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.chat.client

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.chat.client
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.chat.cache.semantic
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.client
Chat client API.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
Provides classes for advising chat clients.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.api
Provides the API for chat client advisors.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.observation
Provides the API for chat client advisors observations.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.toolsearch
Tool Search Tool Advisor package for dynamic tool discovery and search capabilities.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.vectorstore
Spring AI chat client advisors package.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.observation
Provides classes for observing chat data.
org.springframework.ai.chat.evaluation
The org.sf.ai.chat package represents the bounded context for the Chat Model within the AI generative model domain.
org.springframework.ai.model.chat.client.autoconfigure
 
org.springframework.ai.rag.advisor
 
org.springframework.ai.rag.preretrieval.query.expansion
RAG Sub-Module: Query Expansion.
org.springframework.ai.rag.preretrieval.query.transformation
RAG Sub-Module: Query Transformation.
org.springframework.ai.test.chat.client.advisor
Test support classes for ChatClient advisor integration tests.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.client used by org.springframework.ai.chat.cache.semantic
    Class
    Description
    ChatClientRequest
    Represents a request processed by a ChatClient that ultimately is used to build a Prompt to be sent to an AI model.
    ChatClientResponse
    Represents a response returned by a ChatClient.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.chat.client used by org.springframework.ai.chat.client
    Class
    Description
    ChatClient
    Client to perform stateless requests to an AI Model, using a fluent API.
    ChatClient.AdvisorSpec
     
    ChatClient.Builder
    A mutable builder for creating a ChatClient.
    ChatClient.CallResponseSpec
     
    ChatClient.ChatClientRequestSpec
     
    ChatClient.EntityParamSpec
    Configures optional behaviour for entity(...) calls.
    ChatClient.PromptSystemSpec
    Specification for a prompt system.
    ChatClient.PromptUserSpec
     
    ChatClient.StreamResponseSpec
     
    ChatClientAttributes
    Common attributes used in ChatClient context.
    ChatClientRequest
    Represents a request processed by a ChatClient that ultimately is used to build a Prompt to be sent to an AI model.
    ChatClientRequest.Builder
     
    ChatClientResponse
    Represents a response returned by a ChatClient.
    ChatClientResponse.Builder
     
    DefaultChatClient.DefaultChatClientRequestSpec
     
    ResponseEntity
    Represents a Model response that includes the entire response along with the specified response entity type.
